--- match.sql
GRAPH g MATCH (a)-[e]->(b) RETURN a, e, b

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 7,
          Name:    "g",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            Optional: -1,
            Match:    8,
            Pattern:  &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  14,
                          Rparen:  16,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 15,
                              NameEnd: 16,
                              Name:    "a",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  17,
                          EndPos:    23,
                          Direction: "RIGHT",
                          Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 19,
                              NameEnd: 20,
                              Name:    "e",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  23,
                          Rparen:  25,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 24,
                              NameEnd: 25,
                              Name:    "b",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 27,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: -1,
                Expr: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 34,
                  NameEnd: 35,
                  Name:    "a",
                },
              },
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: -1,
                Expr: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 37,
                  NameEnd: 38,
                  Name:    "e",
                },
              },
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: -1,
                Expr: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 40,
                  NameEnd: 41,
                  Name:    "b",
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH g MATCH (a)-[e]->(b) RETURN a, e, b
